markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly sync between Exec and GrowthX to discuss content strategy, GPT integration, and article publishing process.](https://fathom.video/share/Ut1jbU6ekyVHhuKffpJM1iXkpzt6sK88?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Adjust tone in articles to avoid "punching down" on L\&D professionals; focus on empowering rather than criticizing](https://fathom.video/share/Ut1jbU6ekyVHhuKffpJM1iXkpzt6sK88?tab=summary&timestamp=257.0)
  - [Implement GPT-powered tools for objection handling and content generation on Exec's website](https://fathom.video/share/Ut1jbU6ekyVHhuKffpJM1iXkpzt6sK88?tab=summary&timestamp=607.0)
  - [Develop a taxonomy for categorizing articles and series to improve SEO and content organization](https://fathom.video/share/Ut1jbU6ekyVHhuKffpJM1iXkpzt6sK88?tab=summary&timestamp=1179.0)
  - [GrowthX team now has CMS access; articles can be drafted for Sean's review before publishing](https://fathom.video/share/Ut1jbU6ekyVHhuKffpJM1iXkpzt6sK88?tab=summary&timestamp=1538.0)

## Topics

### Content Tone and Audience Sensitivity

  - [Sean highlighted the importance of not implying customers/target audience are incompetent](https://fathom.video/share/Ut1jbU6ekyVHhuKffpJM1iXkpzt6sK88?tab=summary&timestamp=242.0)
  - [LLMs tend to criticize L\&D teams, which is counterproductive for Exec's audience](https://fathom.video/share/Ut1jbU6ekyVHhuKffpJM1iXkpzt6sK88?tab=summary&timestamp=270.0)
  - [Adjust tone to emphasize empowerment and providing tools, rather than pointing out ineffectiveness](https://fathom.video/share/Ut1jbU6ekyVHhuKffpJM1iXkpzt6sK88?tab=summary&timestamp=314.0)
  - [Different approach needed for L\&D content vs. sales-related content](https://fathom.video/share/Ut1jbU6ekyVHhuKffpJM1iXkpzt6sK88?tab=summary&timestamp=526.0)

### GPT Integration for Content

  - [Sean demonstrated ease of creating and integrating GPT-powered tools](https://fathom.video/share/Ut1jbU6ekyVHhuKffpJM1iXkpzt6sK88?tab=summary&timestamp=627.0)
  - [Proposed tool: Objection handling workshop](https://fathom.video/share/Ut1jbU6ekyVHhuKffpJM1iXkpzt6sK88?tab=summary&timestamp=780.0)
      - [Input 1: Customer objection](https://fathom.video/share/Ut1jbU6ekyVHhuKffpJM1iXkpzt6sK88?tab=summary&timestamp=840.0)
      - [Input 2: Broad strokes answer](https://fathom.video/share/Ut1jbU6ekyVHhuKffpJM1iXkpzt6sK88?tab=summary&timestamp=845.0)
      - [Output: Polished, sales-oriented response](https://fathom.video/share/Ut1jbU6ekyVHhuKffpJM1iXkpzt6sK88?tab=summary&timestamp=854.0)
  - [Potential for generating lists of objections based on business type](https://fathom.video/share/Ut1jbU6ekyVHhuKffpJM1iXkpzt6sK88?tab=summary&timestamp=911.0)
  - [Quick implementation (15-20 minutes) once requirements are defined](https://fathom.video/share/Ut1jbU6ekyVHhuKffpJM1iXkpzt6sK88?tab=summary&timestamp=650.0)

### Content Categorization and SEO

  - [Exec's platform allows for nested hierarchies of article series (categories)](https://fathom.video/share/Ut1jbU6ekyVHhuKffpJM1iXkpzt6sK88?tab=summary&timestamp=1140.0)
  - [Need to develop a taxonomy for new articles to improve site structure and SEO](https://fathom.video/share/Ut1jbU6ekyVHhuKffpJM1iXkpzt6sK88?tab=summary&timestamp=1179.0)
  - [Popular series are highlighted on the homepage based on viewership](https://fathom.video/share/Ut1jbU6ekyVHhuKffpJM1iXkpzt6sK88?tab=summary&timestamp=1332.0)
  - [Integration with Exec's learning management system for seamless content display](https://fathom.video/share/Ut1jbU6ekyVHhuKffpJM1iXkpzt6sK88?tab=summary&timestamp=1380.0)

### CMS Access and Publishing Process

  - [GrowthX team now has CMS access](https://fathom.video/share/Ut1jbU6ekyVHhuKffpJM1iXkpzt6sK88?tab=summary&timestamp=1538.0)
  - [Articles should be left in draft for Sean's review](https://fathom.video/share/Ut1jbU6ekyVHhuKffpJM1iXkpzt6sK88?tab=summary&timestamp=1560.0)
  - [Focus on correct configuration for smooth publishing](https://fathom.video/share/Ut1jbU6ekyVHhuKffpJM1iXkpzt6sK88?tab=summary&timestamp=1566.0)
  - [Sean prefers to monitor and adjust post-publication rather than blocking the process](https://fathom.video/share/Ut1jbU6ekyVHhuKffpJM1iXkpzt6sK88?tab=summary&timestamp=1575.0)

### Image Quality for Articles

  - [Current image quality is acceptable for blog content](https://fathom.video/share/Ut1jbU6ekyVHhuKffpJM1iXkpzt6sK88?tab=summary&timestamp=1603.0)
  - [Potential to tweak prompts for more color variability in the future](https://fathom.video/share/Ut1jbU6ekyVHhuKffpJM1iXkpzt6sK88?tab=summary&timestamp=1603.0)
  - [Higher-quality images may be considered for high-traffic or important articles](https://fathom.video/share/Ut1jbU6ekyVHhuKffpJM1iXkpzt6sK88?tab=summary&timestamp=1615.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Elvis to send GPT tool ideas to Sean via Slack](https://fathom.video/share/Ut1jbU6ekyVHhuKffpJM1iXkpzt6sK88?tab=summary&timestamp=607.0)
  - [Develop taxonomy for article categorization](https://fathom.video/share/Ut1jbU6ekyVHhuKffpJM1iXkpzt6sK88?tab=summary&timestamp=1179.0)
  - [GrowthX to draft articles in CMS for Sean's review](https://fathom.video/share/Ut1jbU6ekyVHhuKffpJM1iXkpzt6sK88?tab=summary&timestamp=1538.0)
  - [Adjust article tone to be more empowering and less critical of L\&D professionals](https://fathom.video/share/Ut1jbU6ekyVHhuKffpJM1iXkpzt6sK88?tab=summary&timestamp=257.0)
  - [Begin publishing process, monitoring performance to identify high-impact content for further optimization](https://fathom.video/share/Ut1jbU6ekyVHhuKffpJM1iXkpzt6sK88?tab=summary&timestamp=1629.0)
